title: rubus scabrifolius
intro: Rubus scabrifolius, also known as the rough-leaved bramble or rough-leaved raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections. The health benefits of Rubus scabrifolius include its potential to alleviate digestive issues and its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
